paragraphs.en: MacArthur lives! Readers of a certain antiquity will appreciate the reference. Gen. Douglas MacArthur struck a notoriously uncompromising stance during the Korean War: If victory requires nuking a few bases inside China, so be it. The U.S. should apply whatever force necessary to impose unification on the Korean Peninsula on strictly U.S. terms.
paragraphs.cn: 麦克阿瑟还活着！有一定阅历的读者会明白这个典故。道格拉斯·麦克阿瑟将军在朝鲜战争期间采取了臭名昭著的、不妥协的立场：如果胜利需要核打击中国境内的几个基地，那就这么办。美国应该施加一切必要武力，严格按照美国的条件，在朝鲜半岛实现统一。

paragraphs.en: No thanks, was the strategic response of the Truman and Eisenhower administrations. Their modern equivalent is Kyrylo Budanov, Ukraine’s ferocious former intelligence chief and now a close aide to President Volodymyr Zelensky.
paragraphs.cn: 杜鲁门和艾森豪威尔政府的战略回应是“不，谢谢”。他们的现代对应人物是基里洛·布达诺夫，乌克兰凶猛的前情报局长，现在是弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基总统的亲密助手。

paragraphs.en:
Continue reading your article with
a WSJ subscription
paragraphs.cn: 订阅《华尔街日报》以继续阅读您的文章

paragraphs.en: Holman W. Jenkins Jr. is a member of the editorial board of The Wall Street Journal. He writes the twice-weekly “Business World” column that appears on the paper's op-ed page on Wednesdays and Saturdays.
paragraphs.cn: 小霍尔曼·W·詹金斯是《华尔街日报》编辑委员会成员。他撰写每周两次的“商业世界”专栏，该专栏在报纸的评论版上于周三和周六刊登。

paragraphs.en: Mr. Jenkins joined the Journal in May 1992 as a writer for the editorial page in New York. In February 1994, he moved to Hong Kong as editor of The Asian Wall Street Journal's editorial page. He returned to the domestic Journal in December 1995 as a member of the paper's editorial board and was based in San Francisco. Mr. Jenkins won a 1997 Gerald Loeb Award for distinguished business and financial coverage.
paragraphs.cn: 詹金斯先生于1992年5月加入《华尔街日报》，担任纽约社论版的撰稿人。1994年2月，他移居香港，担任《亚洲华尔街日报》社论版编辑。1995年12月，他回到国内《华尔街日报》，成为报纸编辑委员会成员，并常驻旧金山。詹金斯先生于1997年荣获杰拉尔德·勒布杰出商业和金融报道奖。

paragraphs.en: Born in Philadelphia, Mr. Jenkins received a bachelor's degree from Hobart and William Smith Colleges and a master's degree in journalism from Northwestern University. He was a 1991 journalism fellow at the University of Michigan.
paragraphs.cn: 詹金斯先生出生于费城，获得霍巴特和威廉史密斯学院的学士学位，以及西北大学的新闻学硕士学位。他曾是1991年密歇根大学的新闻研究员。

vocabulary.meaning_en: The ancient past, especially the period before the Middle Ages. Also, great age.
vocabulary.example: Readers of a certain antiquity will appreciate the reference.
vocabulary.example_cn: 有一定阅历的读者会明白这个典故。

vocabulary.meaning_en: Showing an unwillingness to make concessions to others, especially by refusing to change one's beliefs or actions.
vocabulary.example: Gen. Douglas MacArthur struck a notoriously uncompromising stance during the Korean War.
vocabulary.example_cn: 道格拉斯·麦克阿瑟将军在朝鲜战争期间采取了臭名昭著的、不妥协的立场。

vocabulary.meaning_en: The way in which someone stands; a person's attitude or position on an issue.
vocabulary.example: Gen. Douglas MacArthur struck a notoriously uncompromising stance during the Korean War.
vocabulary.example_cn: 道格拉斯·麦克阿瑟将军在朝鲜战争期间采取了臭名昭著的、不妥协的立场。

vocabulary.meaning_en: To force (an unwelcome decision or ruling) on someone.
vocabulary.example: The U.S. should apply whatever force necessary to impose unification on the Korean Peninsula on strictly U.S. terms.
vocabulary.example_cn: 美国应该施加一切必要武力，严格按照美国的条件，在朝鲜半岛实现统一。

vocabulary.meaning_en: The process of being united or made into a whole.
vocabulary.example: The U.S. should apply whatever force necessary to impose unification on the Korean Peninsula on strictly U.S. terms.
vocabulary.example_cn: 美国应该施加一切必要武力，严格按照美国的条件，在朝鲜半岛实现统一。

vocabulary.meaning_en: Relating to the identification of long-term or overall aims and interests and the means of achieving them.
vocabulary.example: No thanks, was the strategic response of the Truman and Eisenhower administrations.
vocabulary.example_cn: 杜鲁门和艾森豪威尔政府的战略回应是“不，谢谢”。

vocabulary.meaning_en: Equal in value, amount, function, meaning, etc.
vocabulary.example: Their modern equivalent is Kyrylo Budanov, Ukraine’s ferocious former intelligence chief and now a close aide to President Volodymyr Zelensky.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他们的现代对应人物是基里洛·布达诺夫，乌克兰凶猛的前情报局长，现在是弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基总统的亲密助手。

vocabulary.example: Their modern equivalent is Kyrylo Budanov, Ukraine’s ferocious former intelligence chief and now a close aide to President Volodymyr Zelensky.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他们的现代对应人物是基里洛·布达诺夫，乌克兰凶猛的前情报局长，现在是弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基总统的亲密助手。

vocabulary.meaning_en: A person who acts as an assistant to a more senior person.
vocabulary.example: Their modern equivalent is Kyrylo Budanov, Ukraine’s ferocious former intelligence chief and now a close aide to President Volodymyr Zelensky.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他们的现代对应人物是基里洛·布达诺夫，乌克兰凶猛的前情报局长，现在是弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基总统的亲密助手。

vocabulary.meaning_en: An amount of money that you pay regularly to be a member of an organization or to receive a magazine, newspaper, or streaming service.
vocabulary.example: Continue reading your article with a WSJ subscription.
vocabulary.example_cn: 订阅《华尔街日报》以继续阅读您的文章。
